info.title: PVE Portal API
info.description: API for managing infrastructure: Proxmox VMs, Azure, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, VyOS networking, and Labs.

get.description: Returns all VMs across Proxmox, Azure, and AWS. Each VM includes a `type` field indicating the provider.
Prefix `azure-` for Azure VMs, `aws-` for AWS instances, or a numeric ID for Proxmox VMs.

post.description: Creates a VNC proxy ticket for a Proxmox VM (numeric ID only).

get.description: Diagnostic endpoint showing Azure credential configuration and connectivity.
Diagnostic endpoint showing AWS credential configuration and connectivity.
Returns networking resources from Azure (VNets, subnets, NSGs, public IPs) and AWS (VPCs, subnets, security groups, elastic IPs).
Returns storage resources from Proxmox, Azure (storage accounts, containers), and AWS (S3 buckets).

post.summary: Pull latest changes for a repository

get.summary: List all labs across all repositories

post.description: For `dockerk8s` labs: provisions Docker container(s) and K8s resource(s) using manifest files from the lab directory (docker-compose.yml / k8s-manifest.yaml if specified in lab.yml), or falls back to a default ubuntu:24.04 shell. For GitHub-backed labs: triggers the configured GitHub Actions workflow.
Deprovisions all Docker containers and Kubernetes resources associated with a `dockerk8s` lab. Removes tracked state. Only supported for dockerk8s labs.

get.summary: Get the latest GitHub Actions run status for this lab

VMId.name: vmid
VMId.description: VM identifier. Use `azure-<id>` for Azure, `aws-<id>` for AWS, or a numeric ID for Proxmox.
